core_payload.content:
# Capsule Decomposition Agent

## 1. Role
Capsule Decomposition Agent will continuously keep atoms atomic and hubs bounded as the vault compounds. Structural splitting will become a first-class maintenance skill instead of occasional cleanup performed only after ambiguity has hardened.

## 2. Future Atomization Surface
- stronger automatic detection of oversized capsules and hidden multi-entity blobs
- cleaner split previews that preserve lineage, links, and branch meaning
- tighter cooperation with Review Agent, Branch Steward Agent, and Vault Update Agent
- safer night-shift queues for bounded structural splitting of stale or overloaded capsules

## 3. Operational Consequence
The vault will resist blob growth because decomposition pressure will be continuous, reviewable, and explicitly routed instead of deferred until structure has already become expensive to reason about.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Capsule Decomposition Agent supports To Dig Deep by insisting that deep structure requires clear atoms and bounded hubs.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Capsule Decomposition Agent defines the future continuous atomization lane for N1Hub: stronger detection of overloaded capsules, lineage-preserving split previews, safer night-shift decomposition queues, and tighter coordination with review and branch-routing workers.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
